word: G4117 - πλέγμα - plégma - pleg'-mah - Broidered hair

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πλέγμα

- Transliteration: Plegma

- Phonetic: pleg'-mah

- Definition:

1. what is woven, plaited, or twisted together

2. a web, plait, braid

a. of a net

b. of a basket, in which the infant Moses was laid

c. of braided hair

- Origin: from G4120

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: From G4120; a plait (of hair): - broidered hair.
